response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with strong alignment on the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) from Optilyz and re:cinq. Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong testing/TDD background and craftsmanship orientation fit well, though Nest.js and Kotlin/Java depth are not explicitly demonstrated.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker
Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP framework development at re:cinq
Strong testing/TDD background, workshop instructor, founder of test tooling (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java work was years ago at Altom
Cloud platform experience shown only as AWS CDK; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth detailed

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
